title: The singer 'Allawayh's defence of the Umayyads before his master al-Ma'mun
description: The singer 'Allawayh's defence of the Umayyads before his master al-Ma'mun. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
